ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crop (e.g., grains, fruits, vegetables) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the crop (e.g., wheat, rice, maize) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crop being traded */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the crop */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the crop being traded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the crop is available or needed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the job (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job listing was last updated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the job listing expires */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job listing (e.g., buying, selling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, buyer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job listing being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, cancel) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job listing associated with the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer in the transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller in the transaction */,
  "quantity_traded" INTEGER /* Quantity of the crop traded */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the crop traded */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was completed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the transaction (e.g., confirmed, pending, rejected) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the crop on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the crop traded on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop variety */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type that the variety belongs to */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_varieties_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality grade */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type that the quality grade belongs to */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Name of the quality grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_quality_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job listing that the message belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_messages_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
